login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Enter your credentials to access your account.
login.email_invalid: Please enter a valid email address.

home.hero_title: Building the future of real estate, housing and municipal services with TechHub
home.hero_sub: Innovative, secure technology solutions … a trusted connection to manage your real-estate data efficiently
home.services_sub: Innovative real-estate technology solutions that drive innovation and meet future needs
home.services_empty: No published services yet — check back soon.
home.adv_sub: Innovative solutions that boost your productivity and simplify your day
home.adv_1_d: The first smart real-estate solutions via APIs, boosting your efficiency and giving you the edge.
home.adv_2_d: Thousands of operations processed daily with high efficiency, saving you time and boosting productivity.
home.adv_3_d: The highest security standards to protect your data and your customers' data, with accredited certifications.
home.adv_4_d: Start benefiting from TechHub services within minutes, through simple, smooth steps.
home.contact_title: We're always here to answer your questions
home.email_desc: You can reach us by email at
home.faq_1_a: API technology is a service that allows electronic integration with different systems for the purpose of exchanging data — its value lies in enabling developers to access various data instantly to get up-to-date information.
home.faq_2_q: Is there a live query platform for the TechHub service?
home.faq_2_a: API technology is a service that allows electronic integration with different systems for the purpose of exchanging data — its value lies in enabling developers to access various data instantly to get up-to-date information.
home.faq_3_q: Who benefits from the TechHub service?
home.faq_3_a: API technology is a service that allows electronic integration with different systems for the purpose of exchanging data — its value lies in enabling developers to access various data instantly to get up-to-date information.

footer.tagline: A unified API platform connecting your systems to real-estate and municipal services, securely and efficiently.

catalog.title: Service catalogue
catalog.subtitle: Browse the available APIs and review their documentation before subscribing.
catalog.error: Could not reach the server. Make sure the service is running, then try again.

service.default_desc: A documented API, ready to integrate.
service.proxies_hint: Your subscription to this product includes access to the technical services below. Select any of them to view its operations:
service.proxy_no_ops: No documented operations for this proxy.
service.doc_none: No documentation file has been uploaded for this service.
service.auth_body: This service uses OAuth 2.0. Send the access token in the request header:
service.already_subscribed_hint: Active on "{app}" — manage its key from My applications.
service.hint_paid: You will be redirected to complete payment, then the service is activated.
service.hint_free: The service will be added to your application directly.
service.interest_hint: Our team will contact you to arrange access.
service.interest_sent: Your interest has been submitted. Our team will contact you shortly.

interest.title: Express interest in «{service}»
interest.subtitle: Enter your details and our team will contact you to arrange access.
interest.failed: Could not submit the request. Please try again.

partner.title: My applications
partner.subtitle: Create an app to get an access key, and request the services you need.
partner.empty: No applications yet. Request your first app to get started.
partner.promote_success: Promotion request for «{name}» sent for production. Awaiting admin approval.
partner.promote_failed: Could not send the promotion request.
partner.production_subtitle: Live credentials for services approved in production.
partner.promote_disabled_hint: The service must be active in test first
partner.modal_where_label: Where should the service be added?
partner.modal_existing_app: Add to an existing app (same key)
partner.modal_new_app: Create a new app for the service (separate key)
partner.modal_note_new: A new app with a separate key will be created for this service. Enabling it requires admin approval.
partner.modal_note_existing: The service will be added to the selected app using the same access key. Enabling it requires admin approval.
partner.app_key_error: Could not determine the app key. Refresh the page and try again.
partner.payment_start_failed: Could not start the payment process. Try again.
partner.profile_registered_note: Your details are registered in Apigee. To change them, contact the portal team.
partner.profile_incomplete: Not completed yet (your name will be derived from your email)
partner.profile_edit_note: This is your saved information. Click “Edit” to change it.
partner.profile_new_note: This information is saved and used when registering you in Apigee. Complete it before creating your first app.

admin_users.title: Admin accounts
admin_users.invite_note: An invitation email will be sent. The recipient sets their own password via the link — no password is set here.

promotions.approve_success: «{product}» is now live in production for partner {email}.
promotions.modal_note: The promotion request for «{product}» from partner {email} will be rejected. Their test-environment access remains unchanged.
promotions.reject_reason_placeholder: Example: required tests were not completed.

admin_interest.confirm_reject_note: Do you want to reject the request from «{name}»? The request will no longer appear in the list once rejected.
admin_interest.account_modal_note: An invitation will be sent to the partner's email to create their account. The partner sets their own password via the invitation link.

docs.select_service_file_first: Select the service and file first.
docs.method1_desc: Upload a Postman Collection file (JSON) to convert it into OpenAPI documentation.
docs.method2_desc: Automatically generate initial documentation from the proxy definition in Apigee.
docs.method3_title: Method 3: Upload a documentation file (PDF / Word)
docs.method3_desc: Upload a ready-made documentation file (PDF or Word) so the partner can download it from the service page.

admin_services.approval_change_failed: Could not change the approval type.
admin_services.approval_toggle_title: Toggle between manual and automatic approval
admin_services.quota_note: The actual request-limit enforcement happens via a Quota policy in Apigee. This only saves the plan for display and billing.
admin_services.name_label: Name (used as the Apigee product/group name)
admin_services.environments_note: Leave blank to make the service available in all environments — the safest default.
admin_services.proxies_note: Hold Ctrl/Cmd to select multiple. Can be left empty and configured later.
admin_services.tier_slug_label: Tier slug (ASCII, used in the product name)
admin_services.create_error_tier_incomplete: Tier {n} needs a label and a slug.
admin_services.create_error_duplicate_slug: The slug "{slug}" is used by more than one tier.
admin_services.create_error_price: Tier {n} needs a valid, non-negative price.
admin_services.create_error_quota: Tier {n} uses usage-based billing and needs a request limit greater than 0.

accept_invite.invite_invalid: The invitation is invalid or has expired.
accept_invite.password_too_short: Password must be at least 8 characters.
accept_invite.password_requirements_not_met: Password does not meet all requirements.
accept_invite.redirecting: You'll be redirected to the sign-in page…
accept_invite.title: Create your account
accept_invite.welcome: Welcome{name}, create a password for your account.

admin_invite.title: Create your admin account
admin_invite.welcome: You've been invited as {role}. Create a password for your account.

not_found.title: Page not found
not_found.body: The page you're looking for is unavailable or has moved. Check the link or return to the home page.

proxy_card.description: An API available through the integration platform.

require_auth.denied_body: This page is for administrators only.
